prompt: Using the mobile banking app sample page provided, design a funds-transfer confirmation screen with transaction summary and success animation placeholder.
prompt_refined: Generate a mobile banking application screen for a funds-transfer confirmation. The design should strictly adhere to the clean, line-art infographic style, light color palette (blues, light yellows, dark blues), and overall UI aesthetic established in image 1. At the top-center of the screen, include a large, prominent success animation placeholder, visually represented by a stylized checkmark icon or a simple success graphic consistent with the visual language of image 1. Directly below this, present a clear transaction summary section. This summary should include placeholder text for key details such as the transfer amount, recipient's name, and transaction date, arranged in a legible, structured format. Ensure the screen's overall layout is minimal and professional, mirroring the example screens in image 1.
objects: Large, prominent success animation placeholder at top-center
Stylized checkmark icon within success placeholder
Transaction summary section directly below success graphic
All elements rendered in a clean, line-art infographic style
All elements using a light color palette (blues, light yellows, dark blues)
